rows.finalText: For "What is the next right step in my calling", the clearest pattern sits in Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. Past opens with the Book, putting what is not yet visible in focus and setting the emotional weather around the reading. Book colors your calling through private knowledge, research, what is not yet visible, and the need to learn before you declare certainty. Book sets the right path ground here: a path confirmed by research — knowing enough to trust the direction. Present turns on the Rider, so the middle card becomes the point where the sequence can redirect. When Rider appears here, it pulls your calling toward the first real movement on the path, where a message, opening, or concrete signal asks to be answered in practice. Rider at the pivot names the right path pressure directly: a signal from outside that confirms the direction. What Future shows through the Tree: your long-term wellbeing strategy matters most now, provided the central pressure is handled honestly. Tree often points to slow growth, deep roots, and whatever needs steadiness rather than speed in your calling. Tree shows where the right path question leads: the slow, quiet confidence that the direction is genuinely right. The Rider is the real hinge in this spread. Respond promptly and confirm facts. That is where the sequence concentrates.
